failingBestPractices.title: Does not redirect HTTP traffic to HTTPS
failingBestPractices.description: Make sure that you redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS in order to enable secure web features for all your users. [Learn more](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/pwa/redirects-http/).
